translation.literal_translation: Because of impossibility in meditations like Madhu and others, Jaimini (holds) non-eligibility. (31)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.3.31: Jaimini denies deva-adhikara on upasana-structure impossibility grounds.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra marker for the Jaimini turn.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S03 pass with stable cadence and inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit pramana and upasana technical vocabulary in records 1.3.076-1.3.079.
